persistence.notes: Messages stored per-group under 'quizzl:messages:{groupId}'. Uses append serialization queues to avoid race conditions.

marmot_context.pattern: New kind handlers go in the subscription callback at line 437, adding elif branch for the new kind. New version counter follows chatVersion pattern.

chat_store_context.pattern: Receives groupId, mlsGroup, pubkey, chatVersion. Loads from IDB, listens to applicationMessage events, provides sendMessage. Poll store will mirror this pattern.

group_detail_view.layout: VStack with Members, Chat (ChatStoreProvider > GroupChat), Scores sections

mls_message_pattern.receive: rumor callback in subscribeToGroupMessages, dispatch by rumor.kind

similar_features.chat_flow: Best analog - ChatStoreContext + GroupChat + chatPersistence.ts forms the complete pattern. Poll implementation mirrors: PollStoreContext + PollPanel + pollPersistence.ts
similar_features.modal_pattern: CreateGroupModal, InviteMemberModal - Chakra useDisclosure + Modal component

integration_points: MarmotContext.tsx:437 - Add kind 10/11/12 handlers in rumor dispatch
GroupChat.tsx - Detect structured poll messages in chat rendering
